Comedy Club Haug Rotterdam – Stand-Up Nights and Big Laughs

Rotterdam

Stand‑up comedy with local and rising acts — bring laughs, tasty drinks and a night where smiling is the main activity.

Comedy Club Haug hosts stand-up in Rotterdam with local and rising acts, great drinks and crowd energy built around laughter.

Boompjeskade 11, 3011 XE Rotterdam
👯‍♀️Easygoing🎯Do Mode
